issue.message: Field requires API level 30 (current min is 29): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_CAMERA`
Attribute `isAccessibilityTool` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 29)

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ANNOUNCEMENT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ASSIST_READING_CONTEXT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_NOTIFICATION_STATE_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_SPEECH_STATE_CHANGE`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUSED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUS_CLEARED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CONTEXT_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_LONG_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SCROLLED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SELECTED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TARGETED_BY_SCROLL`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_SELECTION_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_TRAVERSED_AT_MOVEMENT_GRANULARITY`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOWS_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_CONTENT_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED`

issue.errorLine1: <string name="home_create_profile_hint">Create a profile to set up triggers</string>
<string name="onboarding_welcome_desc">Control your smartphone freely with facial expressions.</string>
<string name="onboarding_camera_desc">Front camera access is needed to recognize facial expressions. No photos or videos will be sent externally.</string>
<string name="onboarding_accessibility_desc">Accessibility service permission is needed to perform actions like pressing buttons or scrolling on your screen.</string>
<string name="onboarding_test_desc">You can test in real-time how well the app recognizes your facial expressions.</string>
<string name="onboarding_profile_desc">Would you like to create a default profile with 4 common gestures?</string>
<string name="profiles_delete_message">Delete profile \'%1$s\' and all its triggers?</string>
<string name="profile_edit_cooldown_desc">Global wait time after any trigger fires</string>
<string name="settings_mode_cursor_click_desc">Move cursor with BT mouse, click with expression</string>
<string name="settings_mode_head_mouse_desc">Control cursor with head movement, dwell click</string>
<string name="settings_overlay_permission_desc">\'Display over other apps\' permission is required to show the head mouse cursor on screen.</string>
<string name="settings_dead_zone_desc">Smaller values respond to finer movements</string>
<string name="settings_dwell_radius_desc">Stay within this radius to click</string>
<string name="settings_expression_toggle_warning">Risk of accidental activation — enable with caution</string>
<string name="settings_qs_tile_desc">Notification shade → Edit (pencil icon) → Drag MimicEase tile to add</string>
<string name="settings_bixby_not_found">Bixby Routines app not found (Samsung devices only)</string>
<string name="settings_gemini_desc">Long-press the app icon to connect a shortcut to Gemini, or say \"Turn on MimicEase\".</string>
<string name="tutorial_step1_desc">First, create a \'Profile\' which is a collection of expression-action mappings.\nEnter a name and tap \'Create\'.</string>
<string name="tutorial_step1_name_editable">You can edit the name any time.</string>
<string name="tutorial_step2_desc">Add a trigger to the profile.\nA trigger defines which expression performs which action.</string>
<string name="tutorial_step3_desc">Select the expression to recognize.\ne.g. Smile (mouthSmileLeft) — even a gentle smile activates the trigger!</string>
<string name="tutorial_step4_desc">Choose the action to perform when you make the expression.\ne.g. Back, Tap, Scroll and many more system actions can be mapped.</string>
<string name="tutorial_step5_desc">Trigger saved. 🎉\nPress the save button to confirm and add it to the list.</string>

<string name="tutorial_step6_desc">Press \'Start Service\' on the Home screen to activate expression detection.\nNow the app will respond automatically when you make the configured expressions!</string>
<string name="tutorial_completion_desc">You can now control your smartphone freely with just facial expressions.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("Inference"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("triggers"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("triggers"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("frames"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera" required="false">` tag
Exported receiver does not require permission
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 29. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
State backed values should use the lambda overload of Modifier.offset
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
